caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a green t-shirt sits in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. His t-shirt features white text that reads "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK". He is positioned in front of a black professional microphone. In the background, a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt stands near a rack of colorful clothing. Small logos appear in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that says "BOSSY FELIX". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks and gestures with his right hand, raising his index finger to emphasize a point. His facial expressions shift from a neutral look to an active speaking expression, and he occasionally glances slightly to his left while continuing to engage with someone off-screen.
